'''âv-b-ch''' ('''kavabach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:line|line]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:line|line]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-b-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kavabach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivabach|thivabach]] || [[word:jivabach|jivabach]] || [[word:shivabach|shivabach]] || [[word:kivabach|kivabach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvabach|thuthuvabach]] || [[word:jujuvabach|jujuvabach]] || [[word:shushuvabach|shushuvabach]] || [[word:kukuvabach|kukuvabach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvabach|thuvabach]] || [[word:juvabach|juvabach]] || [[word:shuvabach|shuvabach]] || [[word:kuvabach|kuvabach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvabach|thuvabach]] || [[word:juvabach|juvabach]] || [[word:shuvabach|shuvabach]] || [[word:kuvabach|kuvabach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevabach|thevabach]] || [[word:jevabach|jevabach]] || [[word:shevabach|shevabach]] || [[word:kevabach|kevabach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovabach|thothovabach]] || [[word:jojovabach|jojovabach]] || [[word:shoshovabach|shoshovabach]] || [[word:kokovabach|kokovabach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovabach|thovabach]] || [[word:jovabach|jovabach]] || [[word:shovabach|shovabach]] || [[word:kovabach|kovabach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovabach|thovabach]] || [[word:jovabach|jovabach]] || [[word:shovabach|shovabach]] || [[word:kovabach|kovabach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvabach|thĂŠvabach]] || [[word:jĂŠvabach|jĂŠvabach]] || [[word:shĂŠvabach|shĂŠvabach]] || [[word:kĂŠvabach|kĂŠvabach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavabach|thathavabach]] || [[word:jajavabach|jajavabach]] || [[word:shashavabach|shashavabach]] || [[word:kakavabach|kakavabach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavabach|thavabach]] || [[word:javabach|javabach]] || [[word:shavabach|shavabach]] || [[word:kavabach|kavabach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavabach|thavabach]] || [[word:javabach|javabach]] || [[word:shavabach|shavabach]] || [[word:kavabach|kavabach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavabach|shavabach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavabach|goshavabach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavabach|gokishavabach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavabachnĂŒ|shavabachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavabachnknĂŒ|goshavabachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavabachnĂŒ|gokishavabachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavabachshĂ«|shavabachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavabachnkshĂ«|goshavabachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavabachshĂ«|gokishavabachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavabachro|shavabachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavabachnkro|goshavabachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavabachro|gokishavabachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavabachmu|shavabachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavabachnkmu|goshavabachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavabachmu|gokishavabachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavabachsher|shavabachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavabachnksher|goshavabachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavabachsher|gokishavabachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavabachng|shavabachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavabachnkng|goshavabachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavabachng|gokishavabachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavabachya|shavabachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavabachnkya|goshavabachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavabachya|gokishavabachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavabachyam|shavabachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavabachnkyam|goshavabachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavabachyam|gokishavabachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavabachnĂŒshĂ«|shavabachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavabachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavabachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavabachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavabachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavabachnĂŒro|shavabachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavabachnknĂŒro|goshavabachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavabachnĂŒro|gokishavabachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavabachnĂŒmu|shavabachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavabachnknĂŒmu|goshavabachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavabachnĂŒmu|gokishavabachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavabachshĂ«nĂŒ|shavabachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavabachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavabachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavabachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavabachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavabachshĂ«ro|shavabachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavabachnkshĂ«ro|goshavabachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavabachshĂ«ro|gokishavabachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavabachshĂ«mu|shavabachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavabachnkshĂ«mu|goshavabachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavabachshĂ«mu|gokishavabachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavabachronĂŒ|shavabachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavabachnkronĂŒ|goshavabachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavabachronĂŒ|gokishavabachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavabachroshĂ«|shavabachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavabachnkroshĂ«|goshavabachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavabachroshĂ«|gokishavabachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavabachromu|shavabachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavabachnkromu|goshavabachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavabachromu|gokishavabachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavabachmunĂŒ|shavabachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavabachnkmunĂŒ|goshavabachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavabachmunĂŒ|gokishavabachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavabachmushĂ«|shavabachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavabachnkmushĂ«|goshavabachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavabachmushĂ«|gokishavabachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavabachmuro|shavabachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavabachnkmuro|goshavabachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavabachmuro|gokishavabachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
